title: BORMIOLI ROCCO Officina Vintage 1825 Glass Bottle with Removable Cap - 1200 ML (37.25 oz) - Set of 3
features: Bormioli Rocco vintage black bottle with removable lid.
This item is part of the stunning Bormioli Rocco collection in Italian design
Elegant quality Italian style glassware Made in Italy
description: Can't have clear glass bottles that ruin your dinner party? Try the elegant Officiana metallic water bottle, to add a touch of glamour to your evening by placing them around the table. Removable vintage cap. Dishwasher safe. 1.2 litres.
